playlist_title: March 20-21 Conference: WORLD AT A CROSSROAD: Two Months into the New Administration

videos.title: The Poetic Principle: Why and How America Must Return to a Classical Culture
videos.description:
Presentation by Dennis Speed at the March 20-21 Schiller Institute / ICLC conference
Watch the whole conference here https://bit.ly/3cYsdTx

Dennis Speed's presentation begins with George Shirley performing the German Lied “An die Musik” by Franz Schubert. It's noted that there is no essential difference between of the spirit of a Lied and the African-American Spiritual, which William Warfield demonstrated performing Roland Hayes's spiritual “Lit’l Boy.” Through a series of beautiful artistic selections, including bass Simon Estes’ dramatic reading of Abraham Lincoln’s Second Inaugural Address and Gettysburg Address; Dikran Tulaine’s recitation of a Hamlet soliloquy; and many others, Dennis demonstrates the universal principle that there is inherent beauty within truth.

videos.title: U.S. Policy Towards Syria: Will it be based on Western Supremacy or the values of a New Paradigm?
videos.description:
Dr. Bouthaina Shaaban, Media and Political Advisor to the Syrian Presidency, gave a passionate presentation to the March 20-21 Schiller Institute international conference. She focused her remarks on painting a picture of the destruction of her country over the last 10 years by an American policy which is based on the ugly axioms of Western supremacy, the deployment of a Worldwide NATO and the obsession with “the rise of China.” She called for a New Paradigm of relations between nations which acknowledges that God created all of us—with different cultures and different histories—which must each and all be respected and allowed to freely develop, to enrich the world as a whole. 

(Helga Zepp-LaRouche noted during the Q&A that Dr. Shaaban’s presentation to a Schiller Institute Conference in Germany in 2016 had been quite optimistic, in great contrast to the destruction of the nation that has taken place since then.)

videos.title: Panel 2 Diplomatic Dialogue: Peace through Development and Cooperation or Annihilation?
videos.description: Harley Schlanger moderates a discussion entitled the Strategic Crisis Facing the Human Race. Wil we have Peace through Development and Cooperation or Annihilation? Speakers include Helga Zepp-LaRouche (Founder of the Schiller Institute), Amb. Ping Huang (Council General of the Peoples Republic of China in New York), Alexey Boguslavskiy (First Secretary, Russian Federation Mission to the UN), and Dr. Bouthaina Shaaban (Political and Media Advisor to the Syrian President)

videos.title: COVID-19 & Triage: A Slippery Slope
videos.description:
The participants of this discussion are members of the "Committee for the Coincidence of Opposites." Learn more about the committee and what you can do to contribute to their efforts https://bit.ly/3m5TZS1
This is excerpt is from the March 20-21 Schiller Institute international conference https://bit.ly/3cYsdTx

Statement on the Committee:
Leading citizens from many nations, including medical professionals, farmers, musicians, scientists, students, educators, clergy, civil rights leaders, community activists and others have endorsed the call issued in October 2020, by Schiller Institute chairwoman Helga Zepp-LaRouche to form The Committee for the Coincidence of Opposites to address the COVID pandemic, now coupled with an extreme famine crisis. Initiators of the Committee, Zepp-LaRouche and former U.S. Surgeon General, Dr. Joycelyn Elders, have emphasized the importance of reviving the non-violent tradition of Mahatma Gandhi and Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., who were able to bring together otherwise diverse and sometime opposed forces, for a higher good.
